fmiModelDescription.description: Lateral motion control system based on discrete-time state-space model, incorporating sensor, estimator, controller, feedforward, and actuator tasks. Includes internal, remote platform-based, and real performance metrics.

ScalarVariable.name: K_trc_fb_0_0
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback gain K_trc_fb[0][0].

ScalarVariable.name: K_trc_fb_0_1
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback gain K_trc_fb[0][1].

ScalarVariable.name: K_trc_fb_0_2
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback gain K_trc_fb[0][2].

ScalarVariable.name: K_trc_fb_0_3
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback gain K_trc_fb[0][3].

ScalarVariable.name: K_trc_fb_0_4
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback gain K_trc_fb[0][4].

ScalarVariable.name: K_trc_fb_0_5
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback gain K_trc_fb[0][5].

ScalarVariable.name: K_trc_ff_0_0
ScalarVariable.description: Feedforward gain K_trc_ff[0][0].

ScalarVariable.name: K_trc_ff_0_1
ScalarVariable.description: Feedforward gain K_trc_ff[0][1].

ScalarVariable.name: K_yrc_x_0_0
ScalarVariable.description: Yaw rate controller state gain K_yrc_x[0][0].

ScalarVariable.name: K_yrc_x_0_1
ScalarVariable.description: Yaw rate controller state gain K_yrc_x[0][1].

ScalarVariable.name: K_yrc_x_0_2
ScalarVariable.description: Yaw rate controller state gain K_yrc_x[0][2].

ScalarVariable.name: K_yrc_x_0_3
ScalarVariable.description: Yaw rate controller state gain K_yrc_x[0][3].

ScalarVariable.name: K_yrc_x_0_4
ScalarVariable.description: Yaw rate controller state gain K_yrc_x[0][4].

ScalarVariable.name: K_yrc_x_0_5
ScalarVariable.description: Yaw rate controller state gain K_yrc_x[0][5].

ScalarVariable.name: K_yrc_psi_0_0
ScalarVariable.description: Yaw rate controller psi_dot gain K_yrc_psi[0][0].

ScalarVariable.name: x0_0
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value for state x[0] (Yaw rate).

ScalarVariable.name: x0_1
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value for state x[1] (Slip angle).

ScalarVariable.name: x0_2
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value for state x[2] (Steering angle).

ScalarVariable.name: x0_3
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value for state x[3] (Steering rate).

ScalarVariable.name: x0_4
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value for state x[4] (Lateral error).

ScalarVariable.name: x0_5
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value for state x[5] (Lateral error rate).

ScalarVariable.name: noise_mean_0
ScalarVariable.description: Mean of Gaussian noise for state x[0].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_mean_1
ScalarVariable.description: Mean of Gaussian noise for state x[1].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_mean_2
ScalarVariable.description: Mean of Gaussian noise for state x[2].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_mean_3
ScalarVariable.description: Mean of Gaussian noise for state x[3].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_mean_4
ScalarVariable.description: Mean of Gaussian noise for state x[4].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_mean_5
ScalarVariable.description: Mean of Gaussian noise for state x[5].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_std_dev_0
ScalarVariable.description: Standard deviation of Gaussian noise for state x[0].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_std_dev_1
ScalarVariable.description: Standard deviation of Gaussian noise for state x[1].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_std_dev_2
ScalarVariable.description: Standard deviation of Gaussian noise for state x[2].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_std_dev_3
ScalarVariable.description: Standard deviation of Gaussian noise for state x[3].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_std_dev_4
ScalarVariable.description: Standard deviation of Gaussian noise for state x[4].

ScalarVariable.name: noise_std_dev_5
ScalarVariable.description: Standard deviation of Gaussian noise for state x[5].

ScalarVariable.name: init_velocity
ScalarVariable.description: Initial vehicle velocity for determining system matrices (Ad, Bd, BdFd).

ScalarVariable.name: sensor_trigger_activated_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for sensor activation. True when sensor reads state.

ScalarVariable.name: sensor_trigger_finished_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for sensor finished. True when sensor output is ready.

ScalarVariable.name: network_sc_trigger_sent_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for network (sensor to remote platform) sending data.

ScalarVariable.name: network_sc_trigger_received_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for network (sensor to remote platform) receiving data.

ScalarVariable.name: estimator_trigger_activated_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for estimator activation. True when estimator starts calculating output.

ScalarVariable.name: estimator_trigger_finished_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for estimator finished. True when estimator output is ready.

ScalarVariable.name: controller_trigger_activated_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for controller activation. True when controller starts calculating output.

ScalarVariable.name: controller_trigger_finished_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for controller finished. True when controller output is ready.

ScalarVariable.name: feedforward_trigger_activated_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for feedforward activation. True when feedforward starts calculating output.

ScalarVariable.name: feedforward_trigger_finished_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for feedforward finished. True when feedforward output is ready.

ScalarVariable.name: merger_trigger_activated_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for merger activation. True when merger starts combining controller and feedforward signals.

ScalarVariable.name: merger_trigger_finished_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for merger finished. True when merger output is ready.

ScalarVariable.name: network_ca_trigger_sent_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for network (remote platform to actuator) sending data.

ScalarVariable.name: network_ca_trigger_received_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for network (remote platform to actuator) receiving data.

ScalarVariable.name: actuator_trigger_activated_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for actuator activation. True when actuator receives input.

ScalarVariable.name: actuator_trigger_finished_in
ScalarVariable.description: Trigger for actuator finished. True when actuator output is ready.

ScalarVariable.name: ff_ref_0
ScalarVariable.description: Feedforward reference input component 0.

ScalarVariable.name: ff_ref_1
ScalarVariable.description: Feedforward reference input component 1.

ScalarVariable.name: velocity
ScalarVariable.description: Vehicle velocity for determining system matrices (Ad, Bd, BdFd). Changes recalculate matrices.

ScalarVariable.name: current_phys_state_0
ScalarVariable.description: Current value of physical state variable x[0] (Yaw rate).

ScalarVariable.name: current_phys_state_1
ScalarVariable.description: Current value of physical state variable x[1] (Slip angle).

ScalarVariable.name: current_phys_state_2
ScalarVariable.description: Current value of physical state variable x[2] (Steering angle).

ScalarVariable.name: current_phys_state_3
ScalarVariable.description: Current value of physical state variable x[3] (Steering rate).

ScalarVariable.name: current_phys_state_4
ScalarVariable.description: Current value of physical state variable x[4] (Lateral error).

ScalarVariable.name: current_phys_state_5
ScalarVariable.description: Current value of physical state variable x[5] (Lateral error rate).

ScalarVariable.name: sens_out_0
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the sensor for physical state 0 (Yaw rate).

ScalarVariable.name: sens_out_1
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the sensor for physical state 2 (Steering angle).

ScalarVariable.name: sens_out_2
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the sensor for physical state 3 (Steering rate).

ScalarVariable.name: sens_out_3
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the sensor for physical state 4 (Lateral error).

ScalarVariable.name: sens_out_4
ScalarVariable.description: Sensed vehicle velocity.

ScalarVariable.name: est_states_out_0
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the estimator for state 0 (Yaw rate).

ScalarVariable.name: est_states_out_1
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the estimator for state 1 (Slip angle).

ScalarVariable.name: est_states_out_2
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the estimator for state 2 (Steering angle).

ScalarVariable.name: est_states_out_3
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the estimator for state 3 (Steering rate).

ScalarVariable.name: est_states_out_4
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the estimator for state 4 (Lateral error).

ScalarVariable.name: est_states_out_5
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the estimator for state 5 (Lateral error rate).

ScalarVariable.name: fb_psi_dot_out_0
ScalarVariable.description: Feedback component of the desired yaw rate command.

ScalarVariable.name: ff_out_0
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the feedforward block for ff_ref component 0.

ScalarVariable.name: ff_out_1
ScalarVariable.description: Output from the feedforward block for ff_ref component 1.

ScalarVariable.name: ff_psi_dot_out_0
ScalarVariable.description: Feedforward component of the desired yaw rate command.

ScalarVariable.name: agg_delta_out_0
ScalarVariable.description: Aggregated steering angle delta command from the merger.

ScalarVariable.name: act_out_0
ScalarVariable.description: Final steering angle command output from the actuator.

ScalarVariable.name: current_time_out
ScalarVariable.description: Current simulation time.

ScalarVariable.name: current_step_out
ScalarVariable.description: Current simulation step number.

ScalarVariable.name: in_local_platform_critical_section
ScalarVariable.description: True if the vehicle is performing a critical maneuver, based on network-delayed data.

ScalarVariable.name: in_remote_platform_critical_section
ScalarVariable.description: True if the vehicle is performing a critical maneuver, based on estimated state.

ScalarVariable.name: real_critical_section
ScalarVariable.description: True if the vehicle is performing a critical maneuver, based on ground-truth data (ideal).

ScalarVariable.name: in_local_platform_rolling_performance
ScalarVariable.description: Rolling average of x'Qx, calculated in the local platform based on network-delayed data.

ScalarVariable.name: in_remote_platform_rolling_performance
ScalarVariable.description: Rolling average of x'Qx, calculated in the remote platform based on estimated state.

ScalarVariable.name: real_rolling_performance
ScalarVariable.description: Rolling average of x'Qx, calculated using ground-truth data (ideal).

ScalarVariable.name: in_local_platform_average_performance
ScalarVariable.description: Cumulative average of x'Qx, calculated in the local platform based on network-delayed data.

ScalarVariable.name: in_remote_platform_average_performance
ScalarVariable.description: Cumulative average of x'Qx, calculated in the remote platform based on estimated state.

ScalarVariable.name: real_average_performance
ScalarVariable.description: Cumulative average of x'Qx, calculated using ground-truth data (ideal).

ScalarVariable.name: in_local_platform_threshold_error_cntr
ScalarVariable.description: Count of lateral error threshold violations, based on network-delayed data.

ScalarVariable.name: in_remote_platform_threshold_error_cntr
ScalarVariable.description: Count of lateral error threshold violations, based on estimated state.

ScalarVariable.name: real_threshold_error_cntr
ScalarVariable.description: Count of lateral error threshold violations, based on ground-truth data (ideal).

ScalarVariable.name: in_local_platform_violated_constraint
ScalarVariable.description: True if lateral error currently exceeds threshold, based on network-delayed data.

ScalarVariable.name: in_remote_platform_violated_constraint
ScalarVariable.description: True if lateral error currently exceeds threshold, based on estimated state.

ScalarVariable.name: real_violated_constraint
ScalarVariable.description: True if lateral error currently exceeds threshold, based on ground-truth data (ideal).
